subcodes.first_line: We have indeed perused thy letter and comprehended what is therein. Know thou that We desire for the servants naught save that which is better for them than ought else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قرانا کتابک و عرفنا بما فیه فاعلم بانا ما اردنا للعباد شیئا الا و هو خیر لهم عما
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
